introSection: Galaxi was an SDC steel roller coaster located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride was a standard SDC Galaxi roller coaster. It was painted white track, black rails and red supports.

sections.title: History
sections.content: It opened at the park between 1985-1994, and closed in 1997. The ride has since been scrapped.

fullText:
Galaxi was an SDC steel roller coaster located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

This ride was a standard SDC Galaxi roller coaster. It was painted white track, black rails and red supports.

It opened at the park between 1985-1994, and closed in 1997. The ride has since been scrapped.
